errors.required_review_fields: userId, gameId, rating and comment are required
errors.invalid_rating: rating must be an integer between 1 and 5
errors.review_already_exists: user already posted a review for this game
errors.required_buy_sell_fields: userId, gameId, date, finalPrice and status are required
errors.required_buy_sell_update_fields: userId, gameId, date, finalPrice or status is required
errors.invalid_final_price: finalPrice must be an integer greater than or equal to zero
